name: Radio Group
description: A set of checkable buttons where no more than one can be checked at a time, with keyboard navigation that moves focus and selection together.

keyboard_interactions.action: Moves focus into the group on checked button, or first button if none checked
Checks the focused radio button if not already checked
Moves focus and checks next button; wraps from last to first
Moves focus and checks next button; wraps from last to first
Moves focus and checks previous button; wraps from first to last
Moves focus and checks previous button; wraps from first to last

required_attributes.description: true when checked; false when unchecked

notes: Arrow keys both move focus AND change selection in a radio group
Only the checked radio (or first if none checked) should have tabindex='0'
